languages.text: {n}В вокс-канале раздается тихий, странно надтреснутый голос Эоганна.{/n} "Вот оно, это место. Здесь мной было совершено то, о чем я жалею каждую секунду последних пятидесяти лет своего существования. Прошу вас, Ваша Светлость, давайте покончим с этим поскорее — боюсь, запас решимости в моей душе не столь велик по сравнению с вашим".

{n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."
languages.original_text: {n}В вокс-канале раздается тихий, странно надтреснутый голос Эоганна.{/n} "Вот оно, это место. Здесь мной было совершено то, о чем я жалею каждую секунду последних пятидесяти лет своего существования. Прошу вас, Ваша Светлость, давайте покончим с этим поскорее — боюсь, запас решимости в моей душе не столь велик по сравнению с вашим".

This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

{n}Eo-gann's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

{n}Eo-gann's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡轻柔却异常沙哑的嗓音从音阵频道中传来。{/n}“就是这里了。过去五十年里，我每分每秒都在为自己在此地的所作所为感到悔恨。大人，请让我们尽快了结这一切吧。我担心自己的决心远不及您那般坚定。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

traits.locale_text: {n}埃欧-甘轻柔却异常沙哑的嗓音从音阵频道中传来。{/n}“就是这里了。过去五十年里，我每分每秒都在为自己在此地的所作所为感到悔恨。大人，请让我们尽快了结这一切吧。我担心自己的决心远不及您那般坚定。”

languages.text: {n}La suave voz de Eogunn se quiebra cuando te habla a través del canal de voco.{/n} «Es aquí. Aquí es donde hice aquello de lo que llevo cincuenta años arrepintiéndome. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, por favor, terminemos lo antes posible. Me temo que mi alma no es tan firme como la suya».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

traits.locale_text: {n}La suave voz de Eo-gann se quiebra cuando te habla a través del canal de voco.{/n} «Es aquí. Aquí es donde hice aquello de lo que llevo cincuenta años arrepintiéndome. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, por favor, terminemos lo antes posible. Me temo que mi alma no es tan firme como la suya».

languages.text: {n}La voix douce et étrangement rocailleuse d'Eogunn s'élève du canal-vox.{/n} « Nous y sommes. C'est ici que j'ai commis des actes qui pèsent sur ma conscience depuis cinquante ans. Je vous en supplie, Votre Seigneurie, finissons-en au plus vite… J'ai bien peur que mon âme ne soit pas aussi forte que la vôtre. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix douce et étrangement rocailleuse d'Eo-gann s'élève du canal-vox.{/n} « Nous y sommes. C'est ici que j'ai commis des actes qui pèsent sur ma conscience depuis cinquante ans. Je vous en supplie, Votre Seigneurie, finissons-en au plus vite… J'ai bien peur que mon âme ne soit pas aussi forte que la vôtre. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'ın yumuşak ve tuhaf bir şekilde çatallı sesi, voks kanalından duyuluyor.{/n} "Burası orası. Varlığımın son elli yılının her saniyesinde pişmanlık duyduğum şeyi yaptığım yer. Lütfen {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu işi mümkün olduğunca çabuk bitirelim. Korkarım ruhumun iradesi, sizinki kadar güçlü değil."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eo-gann'ın yumuşak ve tuhaf bir şekilde çatallı sesi, voks kanalından duyuluyor.{/n} "Burası orası. Varlığımın son elli yılının her saniyesinde pişmanlık duyduğum şeyi yaptığım yer. Lütfen {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu işi mümkün olduğunca çabuk bitirelim. Korkarım ruhumun iradesi, sizinki kadar güçlü değil."

languages.text: {n}Eogunns sanfte und seltsam knackende Stimme ertönt über den Vox-Kanal.{/n} "Das ist der Ort. Hier habe ich getan, was ich in jeder Sekunde der letzten fünfzig Jahre meiner Existenz bereut habe. Bitte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, bringen wir das hier so schnell wie möglich zu Ende ... ich fürchte, die Entschlossenheit meiner Seele ist nicht so groß wie die Eure."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eo-ganns sanfte und seltsam knackende Stimme ertönt über den Vox-Kanal.{/n} "Das ist der Ort. Hier habe ich getan, was ich in jeder Sekunde der letzten fünfzig Jahre meiner Existenz bereut habe. Bitte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, bringen wir das hier so schnell wie möglich zu Ende ... ich fürchte, die Entschlossenheit meiner Seele ist nicht so groß wie die Eure."

languages.text: {n}エオガンの柔らかく、奇妙に割れた声がボイスチャネルから聞こえてくる。{/n}「ここだ。私が過去50年の存在のあらゆる瞬間を後悔してきた場所だ。どうか、陛下、できるだけ早く終わらせてください。私の魂の決意は御{mf|殿|女}ほどではないと恐れている」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's soft and strangely cracked voice comes over the vox-channel.{/n} "This is the place. This is where I did what I have regretted every second of the last fifty years of my existence. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, let's finish this as quickly as possible — I fear my soul's resolve is not as great as yours."

traits.locale_text: エオガンの柔らかく、奇妙に割れた声がボイスチャネルから聞こえてくる。「ここだ。私が過去50年の存在のあらゆる瞬間を後悔してきた場所だ。どうか、御{mf|殿|女}、できるだけ早く終わらせてください。私の魂の決意は御{mf|殿|女}ほどではないと恐れている。」
